Localization.Description: An action with the event log

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Entries in the amount of {datafield1} were imported to the event log on host {event_src.host}
Entries in the amount of {datafield1} were deleted from the event log on host {event_src.host}
Entries in the amount of {datafield1} were exported from the event log on host {event_src.host}
